verses.1: Aliflamra tilka ayatu alkitabi waquranin mubeenin
verses.2: Rubama yawaddu allatheena kafaroo law kanoo muslimeena
verses.3: Tharhum yakuloo wayatamattaAAoo wayulhihimu alamalu fasawfa yaAAlamoona
verses.4: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa walaha kitabun maAAloomun
verses.5: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalaha wama yastakhiroona
verses.6: Waqaloo ya ayyuha allathee nuzzila AAalayhi alththikru innaka lamajnoonun
verses.7: Law ma tateena bialmalaikati in kunta mina alssadiqeena
verses.8: Ma nunazzilu almalaikata illa bialhaqqi wama kanoo ithan munthareena
verses.9: Inna nahnu nazzalna alththikra wainna lahu lahafithoona
verses.10: Walaqad arsalna min qablika fee shiyaAAi alawwaleena
verses.11: Wama yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
verses.13: La yuminoona bihi waqad khalat sunnatu alawwaleena
verses.14: Walaw fatahna AAalayhim baban mina alssamai fathalloo feehi yaAArujoona
verses.15: Laqaloo innama sukkirat absaruna bal nahnu qawmun mashooroona
verses.16: Walaqad jaAAalna fee alssamai buroojan wazayyannaha lilnnathireena
verses.18: Illa mani istaraqa alssamAAa faatbaAAahu shihabun mubeenun
verses.19: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli shayin mawzoonin
verses.20: WajaAAalna lakum feeha maAAayisha waman lastum lahu biraziqeena
verses.21: Wain min shayin illa AAindana khazainuhu wama nunazziluhu illa biqadarin maAAloomin
verses.22: Waarsalna alrriyaha lawaqiha faanzalna mina alssamai maan faasqaynakumoohu wama antum lahu bikhazineena
verses.23: Wainna lanahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wanahnu alwarithoona
verses.24: Walaqad AAalimna almustaqdimeena minkum walaqad AAalimna almustakhireena
verses.25: Wainna rabbaka huwa yahshuruhum innahu hakeemun AAaleemun
verses.26: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
verses.27: Waaljanna khalaqnahu min qablu min nari alssamoomi
verses.28: Waith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
verses.29: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena
verses.31: Illa ibleesa aba an yakoona maAAa alssajideena
verses.32: Qala ya ibleesu ma laka alla takoona maAAa alssajideena
verses.33: Qala lam akun liasjuda libasharin khalaqtahu min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
verses.35: Wainna AAalayka allaAAnata ila yawmi alddeeni
verses.36: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona
verses.39: Qala rabbi bima aghwaytanee laozayyinanna lahum fee alardi walaoghwiyannahum ajmaAAeena
verses.42: Inna AAibadee laysa laka AAalayhim sultanun illa mani ittabaAAaka mina alghaweena
verses.44: Laha sabAAatu abwabin likulli babin minhum juzon maqsoomun
verses.47: WanazaAAna ma fee sudoorihim min ghillin ikhwanan AAala sururin mutaqabileena
verses.48: La yamassuhum feeha nasabun wama hum minha bimukhrajeena
verses.49: Nabbi AAibadee annee ana alghafooru alrraheemu
verses.50: Wa anna AAathabee huwa alAAathabu alaleemu
verses.52: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala inna minkum wajiloona
verses.53: Qaloo la tawjal inna nubashshiruka bighulamin AAaleemin
verses.54: Qala abashshartumoonee AAala an massaniya alkibaru fabima tubashshirooni
verses.55: Qaloo bashsharnaka bialhaqqi fala takun mina alqaniteena
verses.56: Qala waman yaqnatu min rahmati rabbihi illa alddalloona
verses.58: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena
verses.59: Illa ala lootin inna lamunajjoohum ajmaAAeena
verses.60: Illa imraatahu qaddarna innaha lamina alghabireena
verses.63: Qaloo bal jinaka bima kanoo feehi yamtaroona
verses.65: Faasri biahlika biqitAAin mina allayli waittabiAA adbarahum wala yaltafit minkum ahadun waimdoo haythu tumaroona
verses.66: Waqadayna ilayhi thalika alamra anna dabira haolai maqtooAAun musbiheena
verses.68: Qala inna haolai dayfee fala tafdahooni
verses.71: Qala haolai banatee in kuntum faAAileena
verses.74: FajaAAalna AAaliyaha safilaha waamtarna AAalayhim hijaratan min sijjeelin
verses.82: Wakanoo yanhitoona mina aljibali buyootan amineena
verses.84: Fama aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yaksiboona
verses.85: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma illa bialhaqqi wainna alssaAAata laatiyatun faisfahi alssafha aljameela
verses.87: Walaqad ataynaka sabAAan mina almathanee waalqurana alAAatheema
verses.88: La tamuddanna AAaynayka ila ma mattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum wala tahzan AAalayhim waikhfid janahaka lilmumineena
verses.94: FaisdaAA bima tumaru waaAArid AAani almushrikeena
verses.96: Allatheena yajAAaloona maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fasawfa yaAAlamoona
verses.97: Walaqad naAAlamu annaka yadeequ sadruka bima yaqooloona
verses.98: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika wakun mina alssajideena
